creator: lippe@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Submitter,

Looking for your patch, I remember that aegis software has been updated
in the last days by alepulver. Soon, I see that your patch have an
outdated version, and not more the developement version. Browsing in
your official website, I dont found any development versions, thus I
think that we can close this PR, you agree ?

Thanks for your contribution to FreeBSD Project! :)

--
lippe@FreeBSD.org
Felippe de Meirelles Motta
